description: Transform the WordPress site into a professional photography portfolio for Sarah Chen Photography by configuring a static front page. Create a page titled 'Portfolio' containing the heading 'Capturing Moments That Last Forever', the paragraph 'Welcome to the portfolio of Sarah Chen Photography. I specialize in wedding, portrait, and landscape photography based in Portland, Oregon. Browse my work and get in touch to book your session.', the subheading 'Services', and a list of services: 'Wedding Photography', 'Portrait Sessions', 'Landscape Prints', and 'Event Coverage'. Create a page titled 'Journal' containing the paragraph 'Follow along for behind-the-scenes stories, photography tips, and recent session highlights.' Set the 'Portfolio' page as the static homepage and the 'Journal' page as the posts page.
